subcodes.first_line: Thy call was heard in the Most Great Prison, and thy letter attained unto the presence of the Wronged One of the world. God willing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندایت در سجن اعظم اصغا شد و نامه ات بلحاظ مظلوم عالم فائز گشت انشاء الله بر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @idle fancies; lust and passion, @chastisement and requital
